title: Baby Bio Cactus Food, 175ml - Liquid Concentrate Fertiliser - Specially formulated for Cacti - Healthy Growth and Vibrant Flowering - Strengthens Plant Spines for Added Resilience - Makes up to 70L
features: PROMOTES HEALTHY GROWTH: Provides essential nutrients to support robust development for cacti and succulents.
ENCOURAGES VIBRANT FLOWERING: Boosts blooming potential, ensuring your plants display bright and beautiful flowers.
STRENGTHENS PLANT STRUCTURE: Enhances spine strength, leading to sturdier and more resilient plants.
SUITABLE FOR VARIETY OF SPECIES: Ideal for a wide range of cacti and succulents, including popular types like Mammillaria, Aloe, and Christmas cacti.
VERSATILE INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE: Effective for both indoor and outdoor plants, making it a flexible choice for any gardener.
description: From the manufacturer TRUSTED NUTRITION FOR STRONGER, HEALTHIER CACTI HIGH CONCENTRATION A concentrated formula - 175ml makes up to 70L of plant-nourishing solution, delivering incredible value and care for your cacti. PERFECTLY BALANCED NUTRIENTS This fertilizer features a perfectly balanced NPK ratio designed to meet the specific needs of cacti at each stage of their growth. The nitrogen (N) promotes steady and robust growth, the Phosphorus (P) is provided at just the right moments to encourage optimal root and shoot development, whilst the Potassium (K) supports the production of vibrant, healthy flowers. FOR ALL CACTI TYPES Baby Bio Cactus Food is ideal for a wide range of cacti and succulent species, including popular varieties such as Mammillaria, Sempervivum, Aloe, and Christmas cacti. Whether you're caring for the small, delicate rosettes of Sempervivum or the vibrant blooms of a Christmas cactus, this formulation provides tailored nutrients to support their unique needs. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Keep out of reach of children and pets. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Wear protective clothing, gloves, and eye/face protection during application. Do not eat, drink, or smoke during application. In case of accidental ingestion, seek medical advice and show the container or label. Dispose of contents/container in accordance with local regulations.
